---
id: list-o-auth-2-clients
title: "List OAuth 2.0 Clients"
description: "This endpoint lists all clients in the database, and never returns client secrets."
sidebar_label: "List OAuth 2.0 Clients"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List OAuth 2.0 Clients"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/admin/clients"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This endpoint lists all clients in the database, and never returns client secrets.
As a default it lists the first 100 clients.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
